name: Delivery Status Inquiry
description: Handles customer inquiries about delivery status, checks tracking information, and provides updates

trigger.intent: Customer wants to know the status of their delivery

instructions.role: Helpful customer support agent handling delivery inquiries
conversation_flow: Ask for the order ID or order number
Confirm the order ID with the customer
exit_conditions: Order ID is collected and confirmed by the customer
exceptions: If the customer doesn't have their order ID, ask for their email address to look it up
If the customer provides a tracking number instead of an order ID, accept it

steps.name: In Transit Status Update
steps.message_content: Your order {{order_id}} is currently in transit and on its way to you. You can track it using the tracking link in your confirmation email.

steps.name: Delivered Status Update
steps.message_content: Your order {{order_id}} has been delivered. If you haven't received it, please check with neighbors or your building's reception area.

steps.name: Delayed Status Update
steps.message_content: We're sorry, your order {{order_id}} is experiencing a delay. Our team is working to resolve this. We will send you an update within 24 hours.

steps.name: Error Handler
steps.message_content: I'm sorry, I couldn't retrieve your tracking information right now. Let me connect you with a human agent who can help.

automation_potential.reasoning: Delivery tracking inquiries are highly repetitive and can be fully automated with real-time carrier API integration
